description:
Compare the safety of co-administering the PPI 'Omeprazole' with the lung cancer drugs 'Erlotinib' and 'Osimertinib' using the Liverpool Cancer iChart app. Save a screenshot of the interaction result table showing both cancer drugs against Omeprazole to /sdcard/ppi_comparison_table.png. Based on the interaction results, create a report at /sdcard/ppi_switch_recommendation.txt using the following format:

Interaction 1: Erlotinib + Omeprazole
Color: [Color Code]

Interaction 2: Osimertinib + Omeprazole
Color: [Color Code]

Safer Choice: [Erlotinib OR Osimertinib]
Reason: [Brief reason]

Note: Erlotinib absorption is pH-dependent.
